TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Don Ackerman == kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Don Ackerman , squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) Don Ackerman hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. = kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' = aring squ 1930.9.4. tehuk hinqilan nya 2011.7.8, 80 kawas qinnxan nya. gluw na ptkura mari na Amerika qu hiya. 183 kinwagic nya, 83 kinz'usuw nya. pinnzyuy nya ga pklahang te suruw hya. bango na lukus nya ga 3, trang squ mqwas raygaku ga, mnaki squ Cyang Taw ha. mwaiyaw ppzyuy mari NBA squ 1953 ga, te minpusal lga galun nqu Niko la, nanu aring squ kawas 1953 ru kawas 54 lga, min 28 rmaw squ Niko, 43 nagal nya tensu ru 15 sningat nya mari, ru 23 rnaw nya miq mari. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *on a ¶~ ®kerman == kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *on a ¶~ ®kerman , s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) *on a ¶~ ®kerman ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē taj s~…ēuruw taj s~…ēuruw. = kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē = ariŇč s~…ēqu ****.*.*. teńßuk ńßinqilan nja ****.*.*, ** kawas~…ē qinnxan nja. …£luw na ptkura mari na amerika qu ńßija. *** kinwa…£i ¶~ ® nja, ** kinz Ēus~…ēuw nja. pinnzjuj nja …£a pklańßaŇč te s~…ēuruw ńßja. ő≤aŇčo na lukus~…ē nja …£a *, traŇč s~…ēqu mqwas~…ē raj…£aku …£a, mnaki s~…ēqu ¶~ ®jaŇč taw ńßa. mwaijaw ppzjuj mari nő≤a s~…ēqu **** …£a, te minpus~…ēal l…£a …£alun nqu niko la, nanu ariŇč s~…ēqu kawas~…ē **** ru kawas~…ē ** l…£a, min ** rmaw s~…ēqu niko, ** na…£al nja tens~…ēu ru ** s~…ēniŇčat nja mari, ru ** rnaw nja miq mari. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Don Ackerman == kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 9, Don Ackerman , squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) Don Ackerman hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. = kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' = aring squ 1930.9.4. tehuk hinqilan nya 2011.7.8, 80 kawas qinnxan nya. gluw na ptkura mari na Amerika qu hiya. 183 kinwagic nya, 83 kinz'usuw nya. pinnzyuy nya ga pklahang te suruw hya. bango na lukus nya ga 3, trang squ mqwas raygaku ga, mnaki squ Cyang Taw ha. mwaiyaw ppzyuy mari NBA squ 1953 ga, te minpusal lga galun nqu Niko la, nanu aring squ kawas 1953 ru kawas 54 lga, min 28 rmaw squ Niko, 43 nagal nya tensu ru 15 sningat nya mari, ru 23 rnaw nya miq mari. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *on a ¶~ ®kerman == kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *on a ¶~ ®kerman , s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) *on a ¶~ ®kerman ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē taj s~…ēuruw taj s~…ēuruw. = kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē = ariŇč s~…ēqu ****.*.*. teńßuk ńßinqilan nja ****.*.*, ** kawas~…ē qinnxan nja. …£luw na ptkura mari na amerika qu ńßija. *** kinwa…£i ¶~ ® nja, ** kinz Ēus~…ēuw nja. pinnzjuj nja …£a pklańßaŇč te s~…ēuruw ńßja. ő≤aŇčo na lukus~…ē nja …£a *, traŇč s~…ēqu mqwas~…ē raj…£aku …£a, mnaki s~…ēqu ¶~ ®jaŇč taw ńßa. mwaijaw ppzjuj mari nő≤a s~…ēqu **** …£a, te minpus~…ēal l…£a …£alun nqu niko la, nanu ariŇč s~…ēqu kawas~…ē **** ru kawas~…ē ** l…£a, min ** rmaw s~…ēqu niko, ** na…£al nja tens~…ēu ru ** s~…ēniŇčat nja mari, ru ** rnaw nja miq mari. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
